_cite.reason: Span re-point (item 3): fact_span_not_in_source FACT whose span is verbatim in another pool source — re-point search_result_id/source_id/tier to the source that contains it. Deterministic, no LLM. Operator ruling 2026-07-04.

prior.claim_text: The regulation covers vehicles of categories O₃ and O₄ (trailers). CO₂ reduction targets for trailers: Drawbar/centre-axle trailers: 0% for 2025–2029, 7.5% for 2030–2034, 7.5% for 2035–2039, 7.5% from 2040 onwards. Semi-trailers: 0% for 2025–2029, 10% for 2030–2034, 10% for 2035–2039, 10% from 2040 onwards.
